title: Digital Access
subtitle: Cisco Wi-Fi, Secure Guest Access & Captive Portal
shortDescription: Improving digital connectivity through secure guest access, managed Wi-Fi, and better online access for residents, visitors, and barangay operations.
fullDetails: Secure and managed guest Wi-Fi access at the Barangay Hall using Cisco wireless technology and a Philippine flag-inspired captive portal. Improves visitor connectivity, supports controlled internet access, enhances network security, and provides a more organized digital experience for residents and guests.

title: Infrastructure
subtitle: Safer and Accessible Local Roads
shortDescription: Supporting local road improvement, safer pathways, drainage coordination, and infrastructure projects that improve access and mobility.
fullDetails: Infrastructure upgrades to improve mobility and safety across Barangay Hulo's local roads, ensuring accessible and well-maintained pathways for all residents.

title: Health and Wellness
subtitle: Community Health Support
shortDescription: Promoting wellness activities, medical assistance coordination, basic health checks, and public health awareness for the community.
fullDetails: Community health support programs including medical assistance coordination, basic health checks, wellness activities, and public health awareness campaigns for all residents of Barangay Hulo.

title: Clean and Green
subtitle: Environmental Care and Clean-up Activities
shortDescription: Encouraging clean-up drives, proper waste management awareness, and shared responsibility for a cleaner and safer barangay.
fullDetails: Community cleanup, beautification, and sanitation drives to keep Barangay Hulo clean, healthy, and livable for all residents. Promoting proper waste management and environmental awareness.

title: Youth Sports Program
subtitle: Active and Healthy Youth Programs
shortDescription: Activities supporting youth engagement, physical wellness, and healthy competition for the youth of Barangay Hulo.
fullDetails: Youth development programs including sports activities, physical wellness initiatives, and community competitions designed to engage young residents of Barangay Hulo in healthy and productive activities.

title: Livelihood Program
subtitle: Economic Empowerment & Skills
shortDescription: Support activities and training for local livelihood opportunities, empowering residents toward economic self-sufficiency.
fullDetails: Livelihood support programs including skills training, economic empowerment activities, and livelihood assistance for residents of Barangay Hulo seeking greater financial independence.
